title: Trajectories — Travel Management
overview: Trajectories is a specialized, multi-tenant travel management platform designed to unify the entire workflow for tour operators, DMCs, and luxury travel agencies. It bridges the gap between lead generation and final payment, providing a premium experience.
problem: Travel operators struggle with scattered communication across WhatsApp/Email, manual admin overload for Quotations, disconnected payments, and lack of operational visibility.
solution: Trajectories provides a single, unified system for the complete travel workflow. It brings CRM, itinerary builder, quotation system, and payment gateway into one powerful, beautifully designed platform.
howItWorks: Capture Inquiry: Leads from any channel are automatically routed and assigned to team members.
Build Itinerary: Draft visual, day-by-day journeys using a drag-and-drop builder.
Generate Quotation: Create professional branded PDFs or interactive web quotation links instantly.
Collect Payment: Clients review journeys on a premium portal and pay via integrated Razorpay.
Confirm Booking: System auto-updates statuses, generates invoices, and manages trip documents.
features: Customer & Lead Management: Unified inbox, lead scoring, and full conversation history.
Visual Itinerary Builder: Build multi-day trips with saved flights, hotels, and activities.
Smart Quotation System: Interactive portals and branded PDFs with automated pricing.
Razorpay Integration: Secure payment flows for instant deposits and reconciliation.
Team & Permissions: Granular access control for managing large teams and multiple brands.
White-Label Ready: Customizable with your agency's logo, colors, and custom domain.
useCases: Tour Operators: Automate high-volume bookings and scale operations.
DMCs: Manage complex ground operations and B2B agent relationships.
Luxury Travel Agencies: Deliver a high-touch premium digital experience.
Independent Planners: Professionalize brand appearance and automate admin.
whyBetter: Industry-Specific: Built specifically for travel industry nuances, unlike generic CRMs.
Unified Workflow: Keeps your entire business in one tab—no tool-switching.
Premium Client UX: Interactive, mobile-responsive portals for a luxury feel.
Enterprise Architecture: Multi-tenant and secure for running multiple brands.
summary: Trajectories transforms travel operations from a manual, fragmented process into a streamlined powerhouse, saving hours per week and boosting conversion rates.
